conclusions.fixed_header_diff_focus: mirror header differs mainly at the final 4-byte event-offset field: single-page working record uses 0x76 while multi-page page1 record uses 0x4e
conclusions.narrowing: the failing page1 file-browser probe does not differ from the working single-page file-browser in its A-type user-slot body or mirror-value tail. the remaining structural delta is in the surrounding multi-page machinery, especially the mirror/page header and event-offset side of the page1 record path.
